title: phacelia robusta
intro: Phacelia robusta, also known as the desert lavender or wild heliotrope, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of phacelia robusta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. Phacelia robusta can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
